text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek and I are returning from a shopping
trip.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Wow, we must have lost track of time buying all
these things. It's so late!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...What's that?

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck at our New Year's
raffle! This year's grand-prize is a coupon for a
hot spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We've already got a raffle ticket, so why don't we
give it a shot?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: All right! Give it all you've got! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's fun just just to watch, so go for it! Woo, woo!
You can do it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Super Creek's passionate support, I give the
raffle drum a turn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Goodness gracious! The grand-prize?!
That's incredible!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This must be your reward for always being such a
good trainer! ♪
choice_data_list: It was your raffle ticket, so this belongs to you.
It was your raffle ticket, so this belongs to you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, it's yours because you're the one who drew it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Take a relaxing dip in the hot springs and wash all
of your exhaustion away! ♪
choice_data_list: But I want you to rest too, Creek.
But I want you to rest too, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...You're always so kind.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: How about we go together then?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Of course. The trip would be more fun that
way! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: But now's probably not the best time...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
And it's a particularly important period for you,
so...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't we go after we've fulfilled
our Twinkle Series wish?
choice_data_list:
I like the sound of that. A trip to celebrate a job
well done.

I like the sound of that. A trip to celebrate a job
well done.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I'm looking forward to it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make a promise with Super Creek and hold on to
the coupon for the hot spring trip.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness! ♪ Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It says, "The top-quality meat and carrots make
for a mouthwatering melding of flavors."

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Oh, Trainer. Your face says you could eat
the whole thing right now! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure the hamburger steak would be happy to
see it bring you so much joy.
choice_data_list: Huh? Aren't you going to eat it?
Huh? Aren't you going to eat it?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're the one who won first-prize, so it's yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to Super Creek that I only won because
she gave me the raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Really? Then I'll happily join you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've got a kitchen to use, it's time to
start cooking! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll even whip up your favorite salad and soup to
go with it.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's settled! Let's enjoy it together. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Super Creek and I enjoy the ultimate
tasting experience.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Gosh, look at how many carrots you got!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: No, you won them, so they're yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite what she says, I only won the prize
because she gave me the raffle ticket.
choice_data_list:
The raffle ticket was yours to begin with, so you
should take them!

The raffle ticket was yours to begin with, so you
should take them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I suppose I shouldn't refuse if you really
insist... Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I've made up my mind, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to use these carrots to cook for you
every day!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make dishes that both carrot lovers and haters
alike will enjoy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry! I've got plenty of recipes up my
sleeve.
choice_data_list: ...But I'd like you to eat the carrots too.
...But I'd like you to eat the carrots too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her that there are too many carrots for me to
finish and that they wouldn't taste as good if I ate
them alone anyway.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, I can't believe I didn't realize that!
Then I'll join you for each meal.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I'm looking forward to it, beginning
tomorrow! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I reluctantly agree, and we head home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the
third-prize! Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Aww, what an adorable carrot! It's got a nice
sheen and looks really juicy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the prize as Super Creek gushes and
notice that it does indeed seem like quality
produce.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The label says, "Organic carrot grown in northern
soil."
choice_data_list: Here, this prize is yours, Creek.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: What? Really?
choice_data_list:
Of course. You're the one who gave me the
raffle ticket.

Of course. You're the one who gave me the
raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Then I'll gladly accept it. Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I know! Since this is such a nice carrot, let's try
planting it in the vegetable patch! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We can share them with everyone at the academy
if we harvest a ton of them!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's get planting tomorrow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We plant the carrot, and sometime later, it
sprouts. I gaze upon the new bud and feel a boost
of energy!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! As long as you enjoyed yourself, I'm
happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Her kindness makes me feel even more crushed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I want to give her something, so I go to the
exchange counter to claim the tissues, and hand
them over to her.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: For me? Really?
choice_data_list:
Of course. You're the one who gave me the
raffle ticket.

Of course. You're the one who gave me the
raffle ticket.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Then I'll gladly accept...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Don't let it get to you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Seeing your sad face makes me sad too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek and I bond over our shared sorrow
for a while.
